name: Skølfåst
startIntroPart1: Kåvhål the great, you united the scattered Skållic tribes of the tundra into one of the greatest kingdoms ever known.
startIntroPart2: May the winds bring you strength, the seas prosperity.
declaringWar: Death comes to all, your time has come!
attacked: May the wind tear you down, and the waves wash what remains away!
defeated: Very Well. Death comes to all in the end, we will surely see you again.
introduction: Welcome! I offer you food and shelter!
hateNo: We are not agreeing to that!
Your outrageous demands dishonor us both!
afterPeace: Very well, all that fighting was getting boring anyway.
tradeRequest: Perhaps we can help each other
denounced: Your weak people hide behind your empty words.
declaringfriendship: United we cannot fall. Let us be stand together!
uniques: Enables embarkation for land units <starting from the [Ancient Era]>
